data.title: 国际服违规账号封禁 #46
data.summary: [9/10 (Wed) Ban Notice] We have taken disciplinary actions against the players who were found to be
data.body:
[9/10 (Wed) Ban Notice]  

We have taken disciplinary actions against the players who were found to be abusing in-game mechanics to gain an unfair advantage over others.  

■ Total number of players banned: 62
■ Period of Restriction: Permanent
- Removed from the leaderboard.

▶ Details: https://forum.nexon.com/bluearchive-en/board_view?board=3220&thread=3133367
